---
title: "Getting Started with TemporalHazard"
subtitle: "Build, fit, and predict with temporal parametric hazard models"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
---

<!--
%\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started with TemporalHazard}
%\VignetteEngine{knitr::quarto}
%\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
-->

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

This vignette describes the initial package structure and numerical helper
functions that support future parity validation against HAZARD outputs.

```{r}
library(TemporalHazard)
hzr_log1pexp(c(-2, 0, 2))
```
